title: Peruvian Shrimp Ceviche
description: A refreshing and flavorful dish from Peru, made with succulent shrimp marinated in citrus juices.

ingredients.name: Shrimp
ingredients.amount: 1 pound large shrimp, peeled and deveined

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shrimp, lime juice, crispy corn kernels, red onion, and aji amarillo pepper.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and season with salt to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, stir in the chopped cilantro and serve chilled.
Serve with crispy corn kernels and lime wedges on the side.
